scope: Project how standalone owner-rank VJP candidate latencies map onto the retained 8xMI350 TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4-style canary.

inputs.model_assumption: Candidate local-VJP latency speedup applies uniformly to the per-call max owner-rank VJP tail. Step throughput is then scaled from the retained no-profiler 21.12 s/step anchor. This captures the current owner-VJP skew model but excludes secondary overlap changes, memory effects, and final sparse-MLA/LI changes.

candidate_projection.promotion_read: reject: neutral/regressed versus retained recompute path
too small for a new production contract unless it arrives nearly for free
minimum interesting saved-intermediate contract; still only about a 3.3% step-throughput lever
good saved-state target; roughly 5.0% step-throughput lever before overlap and attention work
reasonable first fused-kernel target if parity is clean and memory footprint is stable
strong first production target; about 7.5% step-throughput lever
aggressive target; useful if achievable without extra memory/dispatch cost

promotion_gate.standalone_gate: A fused or saved-intermediate owner-VJP candidate should beat 5.86 ms to justify integration and should preferably be 4.5 ms or faster.
promotion_gate.distributed_gate: After standalone parity, rerun 4xMI350 S4096 GBS64 and 8xMI350 S4096 GBS128 CE2 retained canaries, then regenerate MORI sidecars. A real win should improve retained 8x step 2 beyond 3,200 tok/GPU/s without increasing peak memory or destabilizing loss.
non_goals: Do not integrate public stage1-hidden-only AITER output as the lead path.
Do not claim the modeled projection as measured throughput.
Do not run no-profile canaries for a fused branch before standalone VJP parity and receive-count-distribution timing pass.

bottom_line: Owner-rank VJP fusion is still a real MoE lever, but not a magic 2x end-to-end jump. The first useful kernel gate is below 5.86 ms local VJP; a serious production target is about 4.0-4.5 ms, which models to roughly 3,286-3,334 tok/GPU/s on the retained EP8 canary before attention/LI improvements.
